requirement.description: The gateway shall periodically transmit a vehicle speed value derived from the most recently received engine speed or wheel speed information.

signals.name: ABS_Wheel_Speed_All
signals.description: Average of four wheels used by GW

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW transmits vehicle speed equal to ECM vehicle speed.
test_cases.expected_result: GWS_Vehicle_Speed = 50 km/h and periodic transmission observed

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW derives speed from ABS wheel speeds.
Verify most recent source overrides previous source.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_vs_003(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x384, 3)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_gws_vehicle_speed(msgs[-1]) == 70

def test_tc_gw_vs_006(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x384, 2)
    raw = extract_signal(msgs[0].data, 8, 16)
    assert decode_gws_vehicle_speed(msgs[0]) == raw * 0.01

test_cases.expected_result: Multiple frames observed at expected cycle time

test_cases.test_objective: Verify fallback to ECM when ABS unavailable.
Verify speed consistency during gear change.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_vs_009(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x384, 3)
    speeds = [decode_gws_vehicle_speed(m) for m in msgs]
    assert max(speeds) - min(speeds) < 10

test_cases.test_objective: Verify message ID and signal placement.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_vs_010(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x384, 2)
    raw = extract_signal(msgs[0].data, 8, 16)
    assert raw >= 0
